anti_claim: This standard governs only synthetic prediction reconciliation fixtures. It does not authorize trading, financial or investment advice, live market data, provider calls, public prediction publication, forecast performance claims, release/publication work, or private-data equivalence.

anti_claim_contract.rule: Prediction reconciliation material must state that it is not trading, financial advice, investment advice, live market authority, provider authority, forecast performance authority, or release authority

omission_receipt.reason: public slice carries real fixture packets, exported runtime refs, and secret-exclusion receipts while excluding live market feeds, provider payloads, private prediction dossiers, trading recommendations, and forecast performance claims

allowed_public_inputs: copied macro pattern and routing rows with provenance digests

receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source refs, source pattern ids, projection receipts, public runtime refs, target-universe status, CP1/CP2 counts, oracle diff grade counts, dossier mutation counts, negative-case coverage, secret-exclusion scan, authority ceiling, anti-claim, real_runtime_receipt, and synthetic_receipt_standin_allowed false

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs must be backed by copied source_artifacts rows for this organ; each copied body names source_ref, target_ref, digest, source_to_target_relation, validation_refs, and body_in_receipt=false

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Turning a fixture grader into a trading system, advice surface, or forecasting-performance claim.
failure_modes: CP2 prediction leaves valid target universe
equity or market lane lacks confirmation
receipt or doc implies trading, advice, provider, performance, or release authority
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe prediction reconciliation slice: CP1 branch resolution, CP2 target-universe gating, oracle diff grading, and bounded public dossier mutation.
standard_payload.teleology: Let Microcosm show prediction-engine structure without importing live markets, private data, action authority, or performance claims.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; accepted organ registry and receipt anchors bound the source row but do not grant release, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority.

validation_rules: require CP2 target ids to be inside the declared valid prediction target universe
require CP1 branches to select a side and preserve opposite-side invalidation refs
reject post-target evidence refs in prediction inputs
require equity or market-lane branch confirmation before use
grade synthetic oracle diff rows without performance overclaims
allow dossier mutation only as bounded public fixture deltas
reject trading, financial advice, investment advice, live market data, provider calls, publication, release, or private-equivalence authority
emit secret-exclusion scan, body_in_receipt false, real-runtime receipt status, and public runtime refs
require source_module_manifest rows for copied macro bodies to set body_copied true and body_in_receipt false
digest-check copied macro contract, node, tool, route-decision, fixture-spec, and pattern-ledger bodies before accepting exported bundle runtime shape
scan copied source_artifacts with the public secret-exclusion boundary while keeping body text out of receipts

author.purpose: create a valid Prediction oracle reconciliation instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Prediction oracle reconciliation without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_prediction_oracle_reconciliation and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections
